title: CraftingShield Anticheat
description: CraftingShield lightweight AntiCheat plugin for Minecraft, with SUS Menu and Discord Integration.
body:
# CraftingShield AntiCheat

> ****
> CraftingShield is a AntiCheat plugin for Minecraft 1.21.x, detecting over **40 cheat types** in real-time. From movement and combat hacks to inventory exploits and crash attempts.

---

## Features

### Combat Checks
- **Reach** — Detects attacks from illegally long distances
- **KillAura** — Detects attacking without a valid view angle
- **MultiAura** — Detects hitting multiple entities within milliseconds
- **AimBot** — Detects suspicious rotation locks and spin hacks
- **AutoClick** — Detects inhuman click speeds (CPS)
- **Macro** — Detects suspiciously consistent click intervals
- **NoSwing** — Detects attacking without the arm-swing animation
- **AntiKB** — Detects ignored or reduced knockback
- **Criticals** — Detects illegal critical hits without falling movement
- **FastBow** — Detects releasing arrows before minimum charge time

### Movement Checks
- **Fly** — Detects illegal upward movement and hovering
- **Speed** — Detects moving faster than the server allows
- **Jesus** — Detects walking on water or lava
- **Phase** — Detects moving through solid blocks
- **HighJump** — Detects jumping higher than vanilla allows
- **BunnyHop** — Detects optimally timed jumps for speed gain
- **NoFall** — Detects ignoring fall damage
- **Timer** — Detects sending too many movement packets per second
- **NoSlow** — Detects moving at full speed while eating or blocking
- **FastLadder** — Detects climbing ladders faster than physically possible
- **WebSpeed** — Detects moving at normal speed inside cobwebs

### Block Checks
- **Scaffold** — Detects automatic block placement while walking mid-air
- **Tower** — Detects rapidly building upwards (pillar hack)
- **FastPlace** — Detects placing blocks faster than physically possible
- **FastBreak** — Detects breaking blocks faster than physically possible
- **Nuker** — Detects breaking an unusually high number of blocks per second

### Inventory Checks
- **InvMove** — Detects moving while the inventory is open
- **FastInv** — Detects clicking inside an inventory at inhuman speed
- **AutoArmor** — Detects equipping a full set of armor impossibly fast
- **FastDrop** — Detects dropping items at an inhuman rate
- **HotbarMacro** — Detects switching hotbar slots faster than humanly possible

### Misc Checks
- **FastConsume** — Detects consuming food/potions faster than vanilla allows
- **FastRegen** — Detects regenerating health beyond potion/natural limits
- **PingAbuse** — Detects intentional large ping spikes
- **StorageESP** — Detects opening many containers in a very short time
- **XRay** — Detects suspicious mining patterns (hint system)
- **Spam** — Detects chat spam and repeated identical messages
- **BadPackets** — Detects invalid or manipulated packets
- **BookCrash** — Detects manipulated book packets that could crash the server

---

## Additional Features

- **Discord Webhook** — Real-time flag alerts with role pings on high VL
- **Sus-Menu** — `/cs menu` overview of all suspicious players
- **Multi-Language Support** — English, German, or fully custom language files
- **Prevention System** — Teleport-back, damage cancel & movement cancel on flags
- **Configurable Punishment System** — Warn / Kick / TempBan / Ban at custom VL thresholds
- **Daily Log Files** — Automatic logs saved to `plugins/CraftingShield/logs/`
- **Debug Mode** — Detailed console output for testing and development

---

## Commands

| Command | Description | Permission |
|---|---|---|
| `/cs` | Shows the help overview with all subcommands | `craftingshield.admin` |
| `/cs menu` | Opens the Sus-Menu with all suspicious players | `craftingshield.admin` |
| `/cs reload` | Reloads the config and language files | `craftingshield.admin` |
| `/cs info <player>` | Shows detailed flag info for a player | `craftingshield.admin` |
| `/cs reset <player>` | Resets all VL and flag data for a player | `craftingshield.admin` |
| `/cs toggle <check>` | Enables or disables a specific check at runtime | `craftingshield.admin` |

**Aliases:** `/cs`, `/cshield`, `/ac`

---

## Permissions

| Permission | Description |
|---|---|
| `craftingshield.bypass` | Exempt a player from **all** checks |
| `craftingshield.notify` | Receive flag alerts in chat |
| `craftingshield.admin` | Access all `/cs` commands |
| `craftingshield.staff` | Access staff-mode features |

---

## Installation

1. Download the latest `CraftingShield.jar`
2. Place it in your server's `plugins/` folder
3. Start or restart your server
4. Edit `plugins/CraftingShield/config.yml` to your liking
5. Run `/cs reload` to apply changes without a restart

> **Note:** The `tempban` punishment requires a third-party plugin that provides the `/tempban` command, such as [LiteBans](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/litebans.3715/), [AdvancedBan](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/advancedban.8695/) or [EssentialsX](https://essentialsx.net/).

---

## Compatibility

| | |
|---|---|
| **Minecraft Version** | 1.21.x |
| **Platform** | Spigot / Paper / Purpur |
| **Java Version** | Java 21+ |

---

## File Structure

```
plugins/CraftingShield/
├── config.yml
├── playerdata.yml
├── lang/
│   ├── de.yml
│   ├── en.yml
│   └── custom.yml
└── logs/
    └── craftingshield-YYYY-MM-DD.log
```

---
